top_signals.title: Intel targets Nvidia with new AI chip by year end
top_signals.summary: Leader of data centre unit says company aiming to release ‘inference’ GPU as shares rally more than 200% this year
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rush to buy air conditioners in Japan before pricier models hit next April
top_signals.summary: The new models are expected to be pricier to meet the updated energy standards set to kick in next April, with some manufacturers already phasing out their older models.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit
top_signals.summary: The developer told The Block that two of 48 eligible investors have already claimed 96.5 ETH that was unfrozen, worth nearly $200,000 at current prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cardano Foundation cancels 2026 summit after treasury funding vote falls just short
top_signals.summary: The measure needed two-thirds support but got only 65%, even after late endorsements from Cardano's founder and the Foundation CEO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
